summary: Tested all 8 industry pitch landing pages plus directory page. All pages return HTTP 200, have unique industry-specific content, load shared CSS correctly, and demo modals work properly.
critical_code_review_comments: All 8 industry pages have unique titles matching industry names
Each page references /pitch/pitch.css for shared styles
Demo form submits to production API (app.imonsocial.com/api/demo-requests) - NOT preview
Directory page has noindex meta tag as expected
Copy All URLs button present on directory page
All industry pages have unique hero text tailored to industry pain points

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified via Playwright

test_credentials: No login required - public static HTML pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Industry pitch pages are static HTML served from /app/marketing/build/pitch/. Demo form POSTs to production API (app.imonsocial.com), not preview environment.
